I found two concrete issues behind what you saw, and I fixed the first one in code.

1. Start streaming was using a hardcoded profile id that usually does not exist.
- In [StreamView](StreamCaster/Views/Stream/StreamView.swift#L147), Start calls startStream with "default".
- Saved endpoints are UUID-based, so that id often resolves to nothing.
- I fixed resolution logic in [StreamingEngine](StreamCaster/Services/StreamingEngine.swift#L114) so:
  - first it tries the requested id,
  - if id is "default", it falls back to repository default profile,
  - then falls back to first saved profile.

2. Preview/camera on Simulator can fail even with correct code.
- During test run, logs showed simulator camera failures from FigCaptureSourceSimulator and FigCaptureSessionSimulator.

- This is a simulator limitation/instability, not necessarily endpoint config.
